prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) engine with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) and HKS 264°/264° camshafts for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery, paired with a Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold and custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with Burns Stainless mufflers for reduced backpressure and weight savings (~12 lbs lighter than stock).

OS Giken 2.2L billet aluminum differential with a 1.5-way LSD and 85% lockup under load, paired with a Cusco Type-RS 2-way rear differential mount and Nismo 2-way adjustable rear subframe collars to eliminate deflection during aggressive clutch-kick transitions.

BC Racing BR Series coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, custom-valved for drift-specific rebound (12 clicks) and compression (6 clicks) damping, paired with Swift Springs linear-rate springs and Cusco front/rear adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) to fine-tune chassis rotation under throttle modulation.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders (front: +50mm, rear: +70mm), paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and JDM-spec Infiniti Motorsports front bumper lip with integrated tow hooks for quick recovery during tandem sessions.

Voltex Type-3 rear wing with a 1,200mm carbon fiber blade, adjustable to 20° angle of attack for high-speed stability, mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with integrated Gurney flaps for downforce optimization at drift angles.

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 (front) and 18x10.5 +30 (rear) wheels with 245/40R18 (front) and 275/35R18 (rear) Federal 595 RS-RR tires, paired with Project Kics R40 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 356mm (front) and 330mm (rear) slotted rotors for fade-resistant braking during repeated e-brake entries.
